name: libterm-readkey-perl
title: libterm-readkey-perl
summary: perl module for simple terminal control
description:
perl module for simple terminal control
Term::ReadKey is a compiled perl module dedicated to providing simple
control over terminal driver modes (cbreak, raw, cooked, etc.) support for
non-blocking reads, if the architecture allows, and some generalized handy
functions for working with terminals. One of the main goals is to have the
functions as portable as possible, so you can just plug in "use
Term::ReadKey" on any architecture and have a good likelihood of it working.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libterm-readkey-perl because perl module for simple terminal control.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libterm-readkey-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libterm-readkey-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libterm-readkey-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
